title: ECB pushes back on euro stablecoin proposals, citing financial stability risks
summary: ECB pushes back on euro stablecoin proposals, citing financial stability risks
briefing: The ECB warned EU finance ministers that expanding euro stablecoin issuance could weaken bank lending and complicate monetary policy.

title: SEC approves Nasdaq to list Bitcoin index options on the exchange
summary: SEC approves Nasdaq to list Bitcoin index options on the exchange
briefing: The cash-settled, European-style contracts will trade under the ticker QBTC on Phlx, but still require CFTC approval before trading can begin.

title: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF outflows spark ‘contrarian’ buy signal: Santiment
summary: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF outflows spark ‘contrarian’ buy signal: Santiment
briefing: Ongoing Bitcoin ETF outflows have historically “correlated with conditions favorable for patient accumulation rather than panic," according to Santiment.

title: SEC Delays Tokenized Stocks Innovation Exemption Amid Concerns: Bloomberg
summary: SEC Delays Tokenized Stocks Innovation Exemption Amid Concerns: Bloomberg
briefing: The SEC’s expected regulatory framework would have provided clarity for companies looking to tokenize traditional assets like stocks.

title: Microsoft's Free AI Just Beat OpenAI and Google at Browsing the Web
summary: Microsoft's Free AI Just Beat OpenAI and Google at Browsing the Web
briefing: Fara1.5 is a family of open-weight browser agents from Microsoft Research that outperforms OpenAI's Operator and Google's Gemini 2.5 Computer Use on the industry's toughest live-web benchmark.
